.mobile-tab-select-style-wrapper::after {

  top: 50%;
  right: 12px;
  width: 16px;

  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

    right: -72px !IMPORTANT;

  width: 14%;
}</style></div><div id="text-3247282186" class="text"><p>‘Psilocybin can produce lasting changes in<br />
mood and end-of-life anxiety’<br /><style>#text-3247282186 {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: rgb(43, 58, 114);
}
#text-3247282186 > * {
  color: rgb(43, 58, 114);
}</style></div><div id="text-37090496" class="text"><p>What studies in recent years have found, and continue to find, is that the potential for psilocybin’s medical use is, in fact, profound.“ There are a variety of published studies that now demonstrate that a single dose of psilocybin can produce lasting changes in mood and end-of-life anxiety,”<br /><style>#text-37090496 {

  color: rgb(43, 58, 114);

  width: 14%;

</a><div class="um-modal-body photo"><div class="um-modal-photo"></div></div></div> <script type="speculationrules">{"prefetch":[{"source":"document","where":{"and":[{"href_matches":"/*"},{"not":{"href_matches":["/wp-*.php","/wp-admin/*","/wp-content/uploads/*","/wp-content/*","/wp-content/plugins/*","/wp-content/themes/flatsome-child/*","/wp-content/themes/flatsome/*","/*\\?(.+)"]}},{"not":{"selector_matches":"a[rel~=\"nofollow\"]"}},{"not":{"selector_matches":".no-prefetch, .no-prefetch a"}}]},"eagerness":"conservative"}]}</script> <script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const img1 = document.querySelector('.dynamic-tab-image');
  const img2 = document.querySelector('.dynamic-tab-image2');
  const title1 = document.querySelector('.help-title');
  const title2 = document.querySelector('.help-title2');
  const tabsContainer = document.querySelector('.tabbed-content .nav');

  // Exit silently if any required element is missing
  if (!img1 || !img2 || !title1 || !title2 || !tabsContainer) {
    console.warn('Tabbed content script skipped: some required elements not found.');
    return;
  }

  function updateContent() {
    const activeTab = tabsContainer.querySelector('li.tab.active');

    // Hide all if no active tab
    if (!activeTab) {
      [img1, img2, title1, title2].forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');
      return;
    }

    const tabs = Array.from(tabsContainer.children);

    if (activeTab === tabs[0]) {
      img1.style.display = 'block';
      img2.style.display = 'none';
      title1.style.display = 'block';
      title2.style.display = 'none';
    } else if (activeTab === tabs[1]) {
      img1.style.display = 'none';
      img2.style.display = 'block';
      title1.style.display = 'none';
      title2.style.display = 'block';
    } else {
      [img1, img2, title1, title2].forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');
    }
  }

  // Initial update
  updateContent();

  // MutationObserver to detect tab switches
  const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
    for (const mutation of mutations) {
      if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'class') {
        updateContent();
        break;
      }
    }
  });

  const tabItems = tabsContainer.querySelectorAll('li.tab');
  tabItems.forEach(tab => observer.observe(tab, { attributes: true }));
});</script> <div id="login-form-popup" class="lightbox-content mfp-hide"><div class="woocommerce"><div class="woocommerce-notices-wrapper"></div><div class="account-container lightbox-inner"><div class="col2-set row row-divided row-large" id="customer_login"><div class="col-1 large-6 col pb-0"><div class="account-login-inner"><h3 class="uppercase">Login</h3><form class="woocommerce-form woocommerce-form-login login" method="post"><p class="woocommerce-form-row woocommerce-form-row--wide form-row form-row-wide">

			.cbr-shortcode-popup .select2-container .select2-selection {height: 34px;padding: 0;}
			.popupwrapper{background:rgba(116,194,225,0.7);}
			.popuprow{background:#eeeeee;border-color:#e0e0e0;text-align:left;width:400px;padding:20px;border-radius: 5px;}
			.dot-flashing {
				position: relative;
				width: 10px;
				height: 10px;
				border-radius: 5px;
				background-color: #ffff;
				color: #fff;
				animation: dotFlashing 1s infinite linear alternate;
				animation-delay: .5s;
				left: 15px;
			}

			.dot-flashing::before, .dot-flashing::after {
				content: '';
				display: inline-block;
				position: absolute;
				top: 0;
			}

			.dot-flashing::before {
				left: -15px;
				width: 10px;
				height: 10px;
				border-radius: 5px;
				background-color: #fff;
				color: #fff;
				animation: dotFlashing 1s infinite alternate;
				animation-delay: 0s;
			}

			.dot-flashing::after {
				left: 15px;
				width: 10px;
				height: 10px;
				border-radius: 5px;
				background-color: #fff;
				color: #fff;
				animation: dotFlashing 1s infinite alternate;
				animation-delay: 1s;
			}

			@keyframes dotFlashing {
				0% {
					background-color: #fff;
				}
				50%,
				100% {
					background-color: #03aa6f;
				}
